# Known private v4 flag (cidr list matching)

**Dataset**: `gx_10_conn` (synthetic scenario lab dataset — the technique transfers to your real datasets)

IP / CIDR matching with incidr and the is_* address helpers. Known private v4 flag. the `is_*` address helpers return a boolean (false, not null, on non-match).

```sql
dataset = gx_10_conn | filter is_ipv4(src_ip) = true | alter src_private = is_known_private_ipv4(src_ip) | fields src_ip, src_private | sort asc src_ip
```

_Live-verified on a real XSIAM tenant (returned 15). From the 20-scenario XQL coverage program; technique is dataset-portable._
